details.test: Task 1: Schengen France tourism visa and save to trip planner
Task 2: India tourist visa processing option under budget and before date
Task 3: Start single-traveler visa application with single-entry and regular processing
Task 4: Schedule earliest available morning Schengen appointment in NYC in May 2026
Task 5: Group application with 3 travelers and cheapest shipping for group
Task 6: Build cart subtotal >= 300, apply SAVE20, proceed to guest checkout
Task 7: Find refund policy article mentioning service fees and bookmark it
Task 8: Track order and send message about additional documents
Task 9: Change order shipping ensuring total <= 200
